root_text.an3.163:1.1: “Tīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an3.163:1.3: Attanā ca pāṇātipātī hoti, parañca pāṇātipāte samādapeti, pāṇātipāte ca samanuñño hoti.
root_text.an3.163:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an3.164:1.1: Tīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an3.164:1.3: Attanā ca pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, parañca pāṇātipātā veramaṇiyā samādapeti, pāṇātipātā veramaṇiyā ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.165:1.1: Attanā ca adinnādāyī hoti, parañca adinnādāne samādapeti, adinnādāne ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.166:1.1: Attanā ca adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, parañca adinnādānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti, adinnādānā veramaṇiyā ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.167:1.1: Attanā ca kāmesumicchācārī hoti, parañca kāmesumicchācāre samādapeti, kāmesumicchācāre ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.168:1.1: Attanā ca kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, parañca kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇiyā samādapeti, kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇiyā ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.169:1.1: Attanā ca musāvādī hoti, parañca musāvāde samādapeti, musāvāde ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.170:1.1: Attanā ca musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, parañca musāvādā veramaṇiyā samādapeti, musāvādā veramaṇiyā ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.171:1.1: Attanā ca pisuṇavāco hoti, parañca pisuṇāya vācāya samādapeti, pisuṇāya vācāya ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.172:1.1: Attanā ca pisuṇāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, parañca pisuṇāya vācāya veramaṇiyā samādapeti, pisuṇāya vācāya veramaṇiyā ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.173:1.1: Attanā ca pharusavāco hoti, parañca pharusāya vācāya samādapeti, pharusāya vācāya ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.174:1.1: Attanā ca pharusāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, parañca pharusāya vācāya veramaṇiyā samādapeti, pharusāya vācāya veramaṇiyā ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.175:1.1: Attanā ca samphappalāpī hoti, parañca samphappalāpe samādapeti, samphappalāpe ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.176:1.1: Attanā ca samphappalāpā paṭivirato hoti, parañca samphappalāpā veramaṇiyā samādapeti, samphappalāpā veramaṇiyā ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.177:1.1: Attanā ca abhijjhālu hoti, parañca abhijjhāya samādapeti, abhijjhāya ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.178:1.1: Attanā ca anabhijjhālu hoti, parañca anabhijjhāya samādapeti, anabhijjhāya ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.179:1.1: Attanā ca byāpannacitto hoti, parañca byāpāde samādapeti, byāpāde ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.180:1.1: Attanā ca abyāpannacitto hoti, parañca abyāpāde samādapeti, abyāpāde ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.181:1.1: Attanā ca micchādiṭṭhiko hoti, parañca micchādiṭṭhiyā samādapeti, micchādiṭṭhiyā ca samanuñño hoti …pe….
root_text.an3.182:1.1: Attanā ca sammādiṭṭhiko hoti, parañca sammādiṭṭhiyā samādapeti, sammādiṭṭhiyā ca samanuñño hoti.
root_text.an3.182:1.2: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an3.163:0.2: The Chapter on Ways of Performing Deeds
translation_text.an3.163:1.1: “Someone with three qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.163:1.3: They themselves kill living creatures. They encourage others to kill living creatures. And they approve of killing living creatures.
translation_text.an3.163:1.4: Someone with these three qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.164:1.1: Someone with three qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.164:1.3: They don’t themselves kill living creatures. They encourage others to not kill living creatures. And they approve of not killing living creatures. …
translation_text.an3.165:1.1: They themselves steal. They encourage others to steal. And they approve of stealing. …
translation_text.an3.166:1.1: They don’t themselves steal. They encourage others to not steal. And they approve of not stealing. …
translation_text.an3.167:1.1: They themselves commit sexual misconduct. They encourage others to commit sexual misconduct. And they approve of committing sexual misconduct. …
translation_text.an3.168:1.1: They don’t themselves commit sexual misconduct. They encourage others to not commit sexual misconduct. And they approve of not committing sexual misconduct. …
translation_text.an3.169:1.1: They themselves lie. They encourage others to lie. And they approve of lying. …
translation_text.an3.170:1.1: They don’t themselves lie. They encourage others to not lie. And they approve of not lying. …
translation_text.an3.171:1.1: They themselves speak divisively. They encourage others to speak divisively. And they approve of speaking divisively. …
translation_text.an3.172:1.1: They don’t themselves speak divisively. They encourage others to not speak divisively. And they approve of not speaking divisively. …
translation_text.an3.173:1.1: They themselves speak harshly. They encourage others to speak harshly. And they approve of speaking harshly. …
translation_text.an3.174:1.1: They don’t themselves speak harshly. They encourage others to not speak harshly. And they approve of not speaking harshly. …
translation_text.an3.175:1.1: They themselves talk nonsense. They encourage others to talk nonsense. And they approve of talking nonsense. …
translation_text.an3.176:1.1: They don’t themselves talk nonsense. They encourage others to not talk nonsense. And they approve of not talking nonsense. …
translation_text.an3.177:1.1: They themselves are covetous. They encourage others to be covetous. And they approve of covetousness. …
translation_text.an3.178:1.1: They themselves are content. They encourage others to be contented. And they approve of being contented. …
translation_text.an3.179:1.1: They themselves have ill will. They encourage others to have ill will. And they approve of having ill will. …
translation_text.an3.180:1.1: They themselves are kind-hearted. They encourage others to be kind-hearted. And they approve of kind-heartedness. …
translation_text.an3.181:1.1: They themselves have wrong view. They encourage others to have wrong view. And they approve of wrong view. …
translation_text.an3.182:1.1: They themselves have right view. They encourage others to have right view. And they approve of right view.
translation_text.an3.182:1.2: Someone with these three qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
